pricesFoundDesc: Prices found across e-commerce platforms for this product
aiSearching: AI is searching Amazon, Flipkart, and other platforms for this product
autoSearch: This happens automatically. Prices will appear here shortly.
youHaveLowest: You have the lowest price in the market!
lowestPriceDesc: Your price of ₹{price} is lower than all {count} competitors. You could potentially increase your price by up to ₹{amount} and still remain competitive.
competitorsLowerDesc: {platform} is selling at ₹{price} — that's ₹{diff} less than your price. Consider adjusting to ₹{suggested} to win the price-conscious buyer.
